name: addon-studio
description: Plugin Sankhya Addon Studio 2.0 com 18 skills focadas e 6 sub-agents (addon-reviewer, entity-architect, controller-designer, test-writer, troubleshooter, dbscript-builder). Compativel com Claude Code (skills + agents) e OpenAI Codex CLI (somente skills).
